Video.summary: Kick off the course by getting to know Cimon, a Greek politician and military general, who helped transform Athens into a world power.
Video.grandparentTitle: Unsung Heroes of the Ancient World
Video.title: Cimon of Athens: From Glory to Disgrace

Image.alt: Cimon of Athens: From Glory to Disgrace
Cimon of Athens: From Glory to Disgrace
Cimon of Athens: From Glory to Disgrace

Video.summary: Survey the tremendous military, economic, and material successes that transformed Samos from a sleepy island to a major regional power under his leadership.
Video.grandparentTitle: Unsung Heroes of the Ancient World
Video.title: Polycrates of Samos: The Tale of a Tyrant

Image.alt: Polycrates of Samos: The Tale of a Tyrant
Polycrates of Samos: The Tale of a Tyrant
Polycrates of Samos: The Tale of a Tyrant

Video.summary: In this episode, understand why ancient Egypt had to invent some form of writing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Decoding the Secrets of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
Video.title: Why Egypt Needed Hieroglyphs

Video.summary: Professor Brier shows you how to write each hieroglyph and how to position them.
Video.grandparentTitle: Decoding the Secrets of Egyptian Hieroglyphs
Video.title: The Ancient Egyptian Alphabet

Video.summary: Consider the nature of Athenian democracy and how it functioned in practice.
Video.grandparentTitle: Athenian Democracy: An Experiment for the Ages
Video.title: Why Athenian Democracy Matters

Video.summary: Delve into Homer's epics to examine several early examples of democratic assembly.
Video.grandparentTitle: Athenian Democracy: An Experiment for the Ages
Video.title: The Origins of Greek Democracy

Video.summary: The series begins with a brief overview of Tocqueville's masterwork.
Video.title: An Overview of Democracy in America

Image.alt: An Overview of Democracy in America
An Overview of Democracy in America
An Overview of Democracy in America

Video.summary: Meet the young French nobleman whose most famous book was only one achievement in a life marked by several.
Video.title: Alexis de Tocqueville'A Brief Biography

Video.summary: Take account of changes unleashed by the devastation of the Civil War.
Video.grandparentTitle: America in the Gilded Age and Progressive Era
Video.title: 1865: "Bind Up the Nation's Wounds"

Video.summary: Learn about policies enacted to safeguard citizens and former slaves.
Video.grandparentTitle: America in the Gilded Age and Progressive Era
Video.title: The Reconstruction Revolution

Video.summary: Take a virtual walk from the Washington Monument to the US Capitol to explore the history of Earth.
Video.title: History on a Geological Scale

Video.summary: Learn about the fascinating individuals and showmen whose curiosity led to the development of paleontology.
Video.title: Life Cast in Ancient Stone

Video.summary: Explore the Black Death's pathology and symptoms, and dive briefly into Chaucer's childhood
Video.title: Resilience: Rethinking the Black Death

Video.summary: Investigate the public health consequences of globalization in the medieval period.
Video.title: Medieval Globalization and the Black Death

Image.alt: Medieval Globalization and the Black Death
Medieval Globalization and the Black Death
Medieval Globalization and the Black Death

Video.summary: Begin with an overview of the historical, cultural, and natural riches of Germany and Austria. Preview the route the course will take along the Danube, Rhine, and Elbe Rivers.
Video.title: A Tale of Three Rivers

Video.summary: Your journey starts in Vienna, the cultural, political, and historical epicenter of Austria. In a sweeping tour, visit iconic sites ranging from palaces and cathedrals to cafes and taverns.
Video.title: Vienna: The Heart of Austrian Culture

Image.alt: Vienna: The Heart of Austrian Culture
Vienna: The Heart of Austrian Culture
Vienna: The Heart of Austrian Culture

Video.summary: Learn what the Dead Sea Scrolls are, the story of their unlikely discovery.
Video.title: The Discoveries and Their Significance

Video.summary: Discover more about how scholars gained access to the first seven scrolls discovered at Qumran.
Video.title: The First Seven Scrolls

Video.summary: Explore the scroll known as the Community Rule or Manual of Discipline.
Video.title: Opening and Reading the First Scroll

Image.alt: Opening and Reading the First Scroll
Opening and Reading the First Scroll
Opening and Reading the First Scroll

Video.summary: Consider history prior to the scrolls, beginning with the biblical period and moving forward.
Video.title: The Historical Backdrop of Ancient Judaism

Image.alt: The Historical Backdrop of Ancient Judaism
The Historical Backdrop of Ancient Judaism
The Historical Backdrop of Ancient Judaism

Video.summary: Gain insight into the appearance of Jewish sectarianism in late antiquity.
Video.title: The Rise of the Jewish Sects

Image.alt: The Rise of the Jewish Sects
The Rise of the Jewish Sects
The Rise of the Jewish Sects

Video.summary: Learn about different scholarly views of the historical Jesus.
Video.title: Jesus - The Man Who Became God

Image.alt: Jesus - The Man Who Became God
Jesus - The Man Who Became God
Jesus - The Man Who Became God

Video.summary: In the ancient world, there were many accounts of "divine" mortals. Explore ancient models of divine men.
Video.title: Greco-Roman Gods Who Became Human

Video.summary: Delve further into the interface between the human and the divine in pagan cultures.
Video.title: Humans as Gods in the Greco-Roman World

Image.alt: Humans as Gods in the Greco-Roman World
Humans as Gods in the Greco-Roman World
Humans as Gods in the Greco-Roman World
